ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the customer registered on the platform */,
  "membership_level" TEXT /* Membership level of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Secure password for each customer */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last login date of each customer */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews written by each customer */,
  "helpful_votes_received" INTEGER /* Total number of helpful votes received by each customer */,
  "vine_status" TEXT /* Indicates if the customer is part of the Vine program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_parent" INTEGER /* Parent product ID (if applicable) */,
  "product_title" TEXT /* Title of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the product */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Brand name of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Current price of the product */,
  "average_rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the product based on customer reviews */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "star_rating" INTEGER /* Star rating given by the customer */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes the review has received */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes on the review */,
  "vine" TEXT /* Indicates if the review is part of the Vine program */,
  "review_headline" TEXT /* Headline of the review */,
  "review_body" TEXT /* Body of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was posted */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (approved or pending) */,
  "comment_count" INTEGER /* Total number of comments on the review */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Reviewer's name for easy reference */,
  "product_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image for easy reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Parent category ID for hierarchical categorization */,
  "category_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the category image for easy reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "review_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the Reviews table */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the Customers table */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was posted */,
  "comment_body" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the Customers table */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the Products table */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vine_program" (
  "vine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Vine program invitation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the Customers table */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the Products table */,
  "invitation_date" TEXT /* Date the Vine program invitation was sent */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (pending, approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vine_program_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vine_program_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
